items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-10122 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-05-30T16:26:54Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-10122", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-10122 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:1989767; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-05-30, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-10117 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-05-30T16:26:54Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-10117", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-10117 Exploitation Attempt - DOS"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:9849853; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-05-30, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P4] CVE / Vulnerability - low severity (Risk 3.0/10). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: Exploitation for Client Execution, Endpoint Denial of Service (2 techniques). Actor attribution: CDB-UNATTR-CVE. AI confidence: LOW (18%) - limited source data available.

title: SENTINEL APEX — Low Denial of Service CVE-2026-10116
id: 7dcd1ff7-1212-5dbf-aa75-15e24ab133c1
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-10116 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: DOS
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-10116
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/30
modified: 2026/05/30
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: low
